name: set_keyframe
description: Set a keyframe on a Sequencer channel.

channel_path.description: Binding transform target, for example <binding_guid>:transform or <binding_guid>:transform:location.x.

frame.description: Display-rate frame number where the key should be written.

value.description: Either a numeric channel value or a whole-transform object with location, rotation, and scale payloads.

returns.description: Keyframe mutation summary including the target binding, channel path, and frame.
